nasb.text: Peace be to the brethren, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

esv.text: Peace be to the brothers, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

cnv.text: 願平安、慈愛、信心，從父　神和主耶穌基督臨到眾弟兄。

ccb.text: 愿父上帝和主耶稣基督赐给各位弟兄姊妹平安、爱心和信心！

csbs.text: 愿平安以及随着信仰的爱，从父神和主耶稣基督临到弟兄们！
